# Caches
.cache/
**/.cache/
**/.pytest_cache/
**/__pycache__/

# Python
**/*.pyc
**/*.pyo

# Node.js
**/node_modules/

# Java / Kotlin
**/.gradle/

# Rust
**/target/

# Vivado / FPGA generated files
**/.Xil/
**/*.jou
**/*.str
**/*.wdb
**/*.xsim.dir/

# Editor swap files
*.swp
*.swo
*~

# Operating system junk
.DS_Store

# Podman
.local/share/containers/

# Docker rootless
.local/share/docker/

# Flatpak runtimes
.local/share/flatpak/

# Steam
.local/share/Steam
